hero.name: Dr. Youssef Eddahbi
hero.tagline: Caring for your health, close to home.
hero.subtitle: Personalized, modern and preventive care for the whole family — in Attaouia, Morocco.

about.title: About the Doctor
about.description: Dr. Youssef Eddahbi is a general practitioner and graduate of the Faculty of Medicine and Pharmacy of Marrakesh (FMPM). He is committed to delivering personalized, evidence-based and preventive care — taking the time to listen, explain and follow up with every patient.

services.title: Medical Services
services.subtitle: Everyday medicine, delivered with attention and care.

items.title: General Consultations
items.description: Diagnosis, treatment and personalized advice for adults and children.

values.title: Why patients choose this clinic
values.subtitle: A modern, human approach — with the basics done right.

personal.title: Personalized care
personal.description: Time taken to listen, explain and tailor every plan.

multilingual.title: Three languages
multilingual.description: Consultations in English, French and Arabic.

modern.title: Modern practice
modern.description: Up-to-date guidelines, clean and welcoming space.

accessible.title: Always accessible
accessible.description: Direct line, WhatsApp and walk-in friendly.

testimonials.title: Trusted by patients
testimonials.subtitle: Real feedback from verified Google reviews.

contact.title: Contact & Location
contact.subtitle: Reach out — by phone, WhatsApp or in person.
